title: Crystal Food [Fabric]
body:
This mod adds a new type of crystal called Crescent crystals.

 

Crescent geodes are found in geodes in the deep dark, they are made up of deepslate and Budding Crescent, which can be farmed for crescent shards.

 

Crescent Shards can be used to grow new crystal ores from their storage blocks (eg: If a stone block touching a redstone/diamond block is interacted with, then it will turn to the ore of that material).

It can also be used to grow amethyst buds and works with dispensers.

 

 

All textures were made by the very talented Haunted Chest (Haunted Chest#1399).
